2026-04-28T16:05:22.3868139Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3869230Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3870021Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3871092Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3871679Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3872135Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3872450Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3872798Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3873135Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3873564Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-28T16:05:22.3874439Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m

2026-04-28T16:05:22.3875581Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m
